name: Iso11783IL_PDDSetParameter
title: Iso11783IL_PDDSetParameter
syntax: long Iso11783IL_PDDSetParameter( char paramName[], float paramValue ); // form 1
long Iso11783IL_PDDSetParameter( dbNode simulNode, char paramName[], float paramValue ); // form 2
description: Changes an internal parameter of the PDD API.

parameters.name: debug
parameters.description: activates debug outputs in the Write Window 1: on 0: off

parameters.name: autoUpdateVariable
parameters.description: process variable is updated if value command is received 1: auto update 0: process variable have to be updated manually by Iso11783IL_PDDSetValue e.g. in callback function Iso11783IL_PDDOnDataChanged

parameters.name: Note Using version the version value obtained from the database (node attribute ISO11783PDDVersion) is overwritten.
BootTimeTC"
parameters.description: maximum number of seconds from a power cycle to transmission of the first Task Controller Status message, default: 255

parameters.name: ImplementSectionControl
parameters.description: 1: supports implement section control default: doesn’t support.

parameters.name: PeerControlAssignment
parameters.description: 1: supports peer control assignment default: doesn’t support

parameters.name: TC_GEO_DefinitionPositionBasedControl
parameters.description: 1: TC-GEO definition, position based control default: doesn’t support.

parameters.name: TimeAndPositionForDataLogging
parameters.description: 1: supports time and position for data logging default: doesn’t support

parameters.name: NumberOfBooms
parameters.description: minimum required number of booms that the Working Set requires to operate correctly, default: 0

parameters.name: NumberOfSection
parameters.description: minimum required number of sections that the Working Set requires to operate correctly, default: 0

parameters.name: NumberOfControlChannels
parameters.description: minimum required number of individual control channels that the Working Set requires to operate correctly, default: 0

parameters.name: RequestForLatestStructureLabel
parameters.description: 1: bytes 2..8 of the Request Structure Label message are transmitted as FF. It is used to determine the version of the latest device description structure present at the Task Controller or Data Logger. 0 :default

parameters.name: simulNode
parameters.description: Simulation node to apply the function.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
